message:
test(core): update frankensqlite + proptest suites for module decomposition

Bulk update to 15 frankensqlite test files and 6 proptest files to align with
the MCP/web module decomposition and agent provider diagnostics changes:

frankensqlite tests:
- Updated imports to reference types from new submodule paths
- Adjusted test assertions for renamed/restructured response types
- Enhanced contract_version, evidence, explainability, gate, and
  scaffolding_removal tests with additional coverage (+177 net lines)
- Simplified e2e, logging, and perf tests by removing redundant setup (-99 lines)

proptest files:
- proptest_compact_bitset.rs, proptest_edit_distance.rs, proptest_graph_scoring.rs,
  proptest_network_observer.rs: minor import/assertion adjustments
- proptest_recorder_migration.rs: refactored test helpers (+81 lines changed)
- Added 3 new proptest regression files tracking discovered edge cases:
  proptest_agent_correlator, proptest_chunking, proptest_recorder_storage

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc aec129609eecf8673308652c0a0a82774f6acca15809297ea04b22d2f3b1691f # shrinks to pane_id = 0, agent = ClaudeCode
